# Story 2.8: `tmr init` Workspace Structure Alignment with Epic 2

## Status

Ready for Development

## Story

**As a** manager running `tmr init`,
**I want** the workspace structure and generated files to exactly match the folder/file conventions established by Epic 2 commands,
**so that** all subsequent `tmr team`, `tmr member`, `tmr leadership`, `tmr relationship`, and `tmr project` commands work correctly against the initialized workspace without any structural conflicts.

## Acceptance Criteria

### 1. Workspace Directory Structure (Epic 2 canonical paths)

`buildWorkspaceStructure()` must create the following directories (replacing the old `my-team/` path and adding all Epic 2 paths):

```
my-teams/_members/
my-teams/_teams/
my-teams/_archived/
my-leadership/
my-company/relationships/
my-company/projects/
my-projects/
my-career/
inbox/
operations/hiring
operations/finance
knowledge-base/people
knowledge-base/process
knowledge-base/company
knowledge-base/files
my-tasks/
utils/
archive/
.cursor/rules/tmr
.claude/agents
.gemini/agents
.tmr-core/agents
.tmr-core/skills
.tmr-core/tasks
.tmr-core/templates
.tmr-core/packs
```

- Remove `my-team/` (old path, replaced by `my-teams/_members/` and `my-teams/_teams/`)
- Add `my-teams/_archived/` (used by `tmr team archive`)
- Add `my-company/projects/` (used by `tmr project add`)

### 2. Manager Career Profile (`my-career/{email}/{email}.md`)

- File path changes from `my-career/profile.md` ŌåÆ `my-career/{managerEmail}/{managerEmail}.md`
- Directory `my-career/{managerEmail}/` is created during init
- Frontmatter schema aligned with Epic 2 Story 2.1 AC 3:
  ```yaml
  ---
  email: [[{email}]]
  name: {name}
  role: {role}
  location: {location}         # omit if empty
  teams: []
  reports_to: [[{managerEmail}]]
  date_added: {today}
  updated: {today}
  ---
  ```
- Body sections (in order):
  ```markdown
  ## About

  {name} is a {role}.

  ## Current Manager

  - [[my-leadership/{managerEmail}/{managerEmail}|{managerEmail}]]

  ## Previous Managers

  ## Performance Reviews

  ## 1on1s

  ## Assessments

  ## Feedbacks
  ```
- Email values in frontmatter `reports_to` and in body links use Obsidian `[[...]]` wiki-link notation

### 3. Manager PDP (`my-career/{email}/pdp.md`)

- File path changes from `my-career/pdp.md` ŌåÆ `my-career/{managerEmail}/pdp.md`
- Frontmatter:
  ```yaml
  ---
  name: {name}
  email: [[{email}]]
  role: {role}
  created: {today}
  updated: {today}
  ---
  ```
- Body sections unchanged (Career Goals, Development Plan, Milestones)

### 4. Leadership Profile (`my-leadership/{managerEmail}/{managerEmail}.md`)

- File path changes from `my-leadership/profile.md` ŌåÆ `my-leadership/{managerEmail}/{managerEmail}.md`
- Directory `my-leadership/{managerEmail}/` and `my-leadership/{managerEmail}/1on1s/` are created during init
- Frontmatter aligned with Epic 2 Story 2.4 AC 1:
  ```yaml
  ---
  email: [[{managerEmail}]]
  name: {managerName}
  role: ''
  areas_of_responsibility: []
  date_added: {today}
  updated: {today}
  ---
  ```
- Body sections:
  ```markdown
  ## Overview

  **Name:** {managerName}
  **Email:** [[{managerEmail}]]

  ## 1on1s

  ## Alignment Notes

  _Add alignment notes after 1:1s._
  ```
- Email values use `[[...]]` wiki-link notation

### 5. Team Member Profiles (collected during `tmr init`)

For each team member collected during onboarding:

- File path changes from `my-team/{email}/profile.md` ŌåÆ `my-teams/_members/{email}/{email}.md`
- Subdirectories created: `my-teams/_members/{email}/1on1s/`, `my-teams/_members/{email}/feedback/`, `my-teams/_members/{email}/assessments/`, `my-teams/_members/{email}/performance-reviews/`
- Frontmatter aligned with Epic 2 Story 2.1 AC 3 **plus `gender` field** (see AC 8):
  ```yaml
  ---
  email: [[{email}]]
  name: {name}
  role: {role}
  gender: {gender}
  location: ''
  teams: [default]
  date_added: {today}
  updated: {today}
  ---
  ```
- Body sections (in order):
  ```markdown
  ## Current Manager

  - [[../../my-career/{managerEmail}/{managerEmail}|{managerEmail}]]

  ## Previous Managers

  ## Other Leaderships

  ## Previous Leaderships

  ## Performance Reviews

  ## 1on1s

  ## Assessments

  ## Feedbacks
  ```
- "Current Manager" populated with wiki-link to manager's own career profile

### 6. Default Team created during init

- If team members were collected during onboarding, create a default team named `default`:
  - `my-teams/_teams/default/default-context.md` with frontmatter:
    ```yaml
    ---
    team: default
    created: {today}
    updated: {today}
    ---
    ```
  - `my-teams/_teams/default/default-members.md` with:
    ```markdown
    # Team Members

    ```
    Followed by one line per member: `- [[../../_members/{email}/{email}|{email}]]`

### 7. Obsidian wiki-link notation applied everywhere

All email addresses appearing in generated file content (body text, frontmatter values that reference other files) must use `[[path/to/file|display-text]]` or `[[email]]` notation:
- In frontmatter fields that reference other entities (e.g., `reports_to`, `email` itself as a self-link): use `[[{email}]]`
- In markdown body links: use full relative path `[[relative/path/to/file|display-email]]`
- Plain-text email addresses in body prose (e.g., `**Email:** user@example.com`) should use `[[user@example.com]]` notation

### 8. `OnboardingData` type updated

- `LeadershipContext` interface: ensure `managerEmail` and `managerName` are required (no changes needed)
- `TeamMember` interface: **keep `gender` field** (important for people context); add `location?: string`
- `ManagerProfile` interface: no changes needed

### 9. Prompt updates

- `promptTeamMembers`: **keep gender `select` prompt**; add optional location `input` prompt (default `''`) after role
- `promptLeadershipContext`: no changes needed

### 10. `writeTeamMemberFiles` path corrected

- Old path: `my-team/{email}/profile.md`
- New path: `my-teams/_members/{email}/{email}.md`
- Additionally create subdirectories per member: `1on1s/`, `feedback/`, `assessments/`, `performance-reviews/` under `my-teams/_members/{email}/`

### 11. `writeWorkspaceFiles` paths corrected

- Old: `my-career/profile.md` ŌåÆ New: `my-career/{profile.email}/{profile.email}.md`
- Old: `my-career/pdp.md` ŌåÆ New: `my-career/{profile.email}/pdp.md`
- Old: `my-leadership/profile.md` ŌåÆ New: `my-leadership/{leadershipContext.managerEmail}/{leadershipContext.managerEmail}.md`

### 12. Backward compatibility

- Remove `my-team/` from `WORKSPACE_DIRS` (old path no longer needed)
- The old `my-leadership/profile.md` flat file is no longer generated

### 13. Unit and integration tests updated

- All tests referencing `my-team/` paths updated to `my-teams/_members/`
- All tests referencing `my-career/profile.md` updated to `my-career/{email}/{email}.md`
- All tests referencing `my-leadership/profile.md` updated to `my-leadership/{email}/{email}.md`
- New assertions for `default-members.md` wiki-links
- New assertions for `[[...]]` notation in generated file content
- `TeamMember` mock data: add `location` field; **keep `gender`**

## Tasks / Subtasks

- [ ] Task 1: Update `OnboardingData` types (AC: 8)
  - [ ] `src/types/onboarding.types.ts`: add `location?: string` to `TeamMember`; **keep `gender: string`**
  - [ ] Keep `ManagerProfile` and `LeadershipContext` as-is (already correct)

- [ ] Task 2: Update `promptTeamMembers` (AC: 9)
  - [ ] `src/workflows/onboarding.prompts.ts`: **keep gender `select` prompt**
  - [ ] Add optional location `input` prompt (default `''`) after the role prompt
  - [ ] Update `members.push(...)` to include `location`

- [ ] Task 3: Update `workspace-builder.ts` (AC: 1)
  - [ ] Remove `my-team` from `WORKSPACE_DIRS`
  - [ ] Add `my-teams/_members`, `my-teams/_teams`, `my-teams/_archived`
  - [ ] Add `my-company/projects`
  - [ ] Keep all other existing dirs

- [ ] Task 4: Update `onboarding.templates.ts` (AC: 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7)
  - [ ] Update `generateCareerProfile()`: new path logic, new frontmatter, new body with `[[...]]` links
  - [ ] Update `generatePdp()`: new frontmatter with `[[email]]`
  - [ ] Update `generateLeadershipProfile()`: new path, new frontmatter, new body with `[[...]]` links
  - [ ] Update `generateTeamMemberProfile()`: new path, new frontmatter (**keep gender**, add location), new body with manager wiki-link
  - [ ] Add `generateDefaultTeamContext(today: string): string`
  - [ ] Add `generateDefaultTeamMembers(members: TeamMember[]): string` ŌĆö outputs wiki-links list

- [ ] Task 5: Update `init.command.ts` (AC: 10, 11, 12)
  - [ ] Update `writeWorkspaceFiles()`: use `profile.email` in paths for career and pdp files; use `leadershipContext.managerEmail` in path for leadership file
  - [ ] Create `my-career/{email}/` and `my-leadership/{managerEmail}/1on1s/` directories before writing files
  - [ ] Update `writeTeamMemberFiles()`: new path `my-teams/_members/{email}/{email}.md`; create `1on1s/`, `feedback/`, `assessments/`, `performance-reviews/` subdirs per member
  - [ ] Add `writeDefaultTeam()`: if members > 0, write `my-teams/_teams/default/default-context.md` and `my-teams/_teams/default/default-members.md`

- [ ] Task 6: Update all affected tests (AC: 13)
  - [ ] `tests/commands/init.command.test.ts`: update all path assertions, add `location` to mock data
  - [ ] `tests/integration/init.integration.test.ts`: update all path assertions, add `[[...]]` content assertions
  - [ ] Any other test files referencing old paths

- [ ] Task 7: Validate
  - [ ] `npm run validate` ŌåÆ lint + typecheck + all tests green + build
  - [ ] Manual smoke test: run `tmr init` and verify folder structure matches Epic 2 spec

## Dev Notes

### Wiki-link patterns to use

```typescript
// Self-referencing email in frontmatter
`email: [[${email}]]`

// Reference to another person's file from a member profile
`- [[../../my-career/${managerEmail}/${managerEmail}|${managerEmail}]]`

// Reference to member from team members file
`- [[../../_members/${email}/${email}|${email}]]`

// Reference to manager from member profile
`- [[../../my-career/${managerEmail}/${managerEmail}|${managerEmail}]]`
```

### Path changes summary

| Old path | New path |
|----------|----------|
| `my-team/{email}/profile.md` | `my-teams/_members/{email}/{email}.md` |
| `my-career/profile.md` | `my-career/{managerEmail}/{managerEmail}.md` |
| `my-career/pdp.md` | `my-career/{managerEmail}/pdp.md` |
| `my-leadership/profile.md` | `my-leadership/{managerEmail}/{managerEmail}.md` |
| _(new)_ | `my-teams/_teams/default/default-context.md` |
| _(new)_ | `my-teams/_teams/default/default-members.md` |

### Member subdirectory creation

For each team member, `writeTeamMemberFiles` must also create:
```
my-teams/_members/{email}/1on1s/
my-teams/_members/{email}/feedback/
my-teams/_members/{email}/assessments/
my-teams/_members/{email}/performance-reviews/
```

These are created via `fileSystemService.createDirectory()` before writing the profile file.

### `generateTeamMemberProfile` new template

```typescript
export function generateTeamMemberProfile(member: TeamMember, managerEmail: string): string {
  const date = today();
  const locationLine = member.location ? `location: ${member.location}\n` : `location: ''\n`;
  return `---
email: [[${member.email}]]
name: ${member.name}
role: ${member.role}
gender: ${member.gender}
${locationLine}teams: [default]
date_added: ${date}
updated: ${date}
---

## Current Manager

- [[../../my-career/${managerEmail}/${managerEmail}|${managerEmail}]]

## Previous Managers

## Other Leaderships

## Previous Leaderships

## Performance Reviews

## 1on1s

## Assessments

## Feedbacks
`;
}
```

Note the signature change: `managerEmail` is now a required second parameter. `gender` is kept from the existing onboarding flow and included in the frontmatter.

### `generateCareerProfile` new template

```typescript
export function generateCareerProfile(data: OnboardingData): string {
  const { profile, leadershipContext } = data;
  const locationLine = profile.location ? `location: ${profile.location}\n` : '';
  return `---
email: [[${profile.email}]]
name: ${profile.name}
role: ${profile.role}
${locationLine}teams: []
reports_to: [[${leadershipContext.managerEmail}]]
date_added: ${today()}
updated: ${today()}
---

## About

${profile.name} is a ${profile.role}.

## Current Manager

- [[../my-leadership/${leadershipContext.managerEmail}/${leadershipContext.managerEmail}|${leadershipContext.managerEmail}]]

## Previous Managers

## Performance Reviews

## 1on1s

## Assessments

## Feedbacks
`;
}
```

### `generateLeadershipProfile` new template

```typescript
export function generateLeadershipProfile(data: OnboardingData): string {
  const { leadershipContext } = data;
  const date = today();
  return `---
email: [[${leadershipContext.managerEmail}]]
name: ${leadershipContext.managerName}
role: ''
areas_of_responsibility: []
date_added: ${date}
updated: ${date}
---

## Overview

**Name:** ${leadershipContext.managerName}
**Email:** [[${leadershipContext.managerEmail}]]

## 1on1s

## Alignment Notes

_Add alignment notes after 1:1s._
`;
}
```

### Architectural Debt Resolved

This story resolves the following open architectural debts from Story 1.6:
- **ARCH-1.6-04**: `my-leadership/profile.md` flat path ŌåÆ now uses `my-leadership/{email}/{email}.md` (Epic 2 canonical)
- **QA-1.6R-05**: `generateCareerProfile` missing schema fields ŌåÆ now fully aligned with Epic 2 frontmatter
